languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, обнаружены признаки человеческой активности. Планета обитаема — фиксируются массовые скопления людей. Искусственные, пускай и примитивные, постройки".
"Lord Captain, there are signs of human activity. The planet is inhabited — large concentrations of people detected. Human-made structures too, albeit crude ones."
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, обнаружены признаки человеческой активности. Планета обитаема — фиксируются массовые скопления людей. Искусственные, пускай и примитивные, постройки".

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, there are signs of human activity. The planet is inhabited — large concentrations of people are detected. Human-made structures, but crude ones."
"Lord Captain, there are signs of human activity. The planet is inhabited — large concentrations of people detected. Human-made structures too, albeit crude ones."
"Lord Captain, I am registering signs of human activity. The planet is inhabited — I am detecting a large concentration of people. Human-made structures, but crude ones."
"Lord Captain, there are signs of human activity. The planet is inhabited — large concentrations of people are detected. Human-made structures, but crude ones."
"Lord Captain, there are signs of human activity. The planet is inhabited — large concentrations of people detected. Human-made structures too, albeit crude ones."

languages.text: 「艦長、人間活動の兆候を検知しました。この惑星には居住者がいるようです。人口の集中地を検知しました。人間が作った建造物ですが、粗末なものです」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I am registering signs of human activity. The planet is inhabited — I am detecting a large concentration of people. Human-made structures, but crude ones."

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan, insan faaliyetine dair işaretler var. Gezegen iskân edilmiş. Büyük bir insan yoğunluğu saptandı. Kaba saba olsa insan yapımı yapılar da mevcut."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, there are signs of human activity. The planet is inhabited — large concentrations of people detected. Human-made structures too, albeit crude ones."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan, insan faaliyetine dair işaretler var. Gezegen iskân edilmiş. Büyük bir insan yoğunluğu saptandı. Kaba saba olsa insan yapımı yapılar da mevcut."

languages.text: “舰长大人，有人类活动的迹象。这颗行星是有人居住的——已探测到大规模人口聚集，还有人造的建筑物，不过工艺很粗糙。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, there are signs of human activity. The planet is inhabited — large concentrations of people detected. Human-made structures too, albeit crude ones."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，有人类活动的迹象。这颗行星是有人居住的——已探测到大规模人口聚集，还有人造的建筑物，不过工艺很粗糙。”

languages.text: "Lord Captain, es gibt Anzeichen menschlicher Aktivitäten. Der Planet ist bewohnt ... große Konzentration von Personen geortet. Und menschliche Strukturen, allerdings primitiv."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, there are signs of human activity. The planet is inhabited — large concentrations of people detected. Human-made structures too, albeit crude ones."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, es gibt Anzeichen menschlicher Aktivitäten. Der Planet ist bewohnt ... große Konzentration von Personen geortet. Und menschliche Strukturen, allerdings primitiv."

languages.text: « J'enregistre des signes d'activité humaine, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Cette planète est habitée, je détecte à sa surface une forte concentration d'individus ainsi que des infrastructures rudimentaires, certes, mais de facture indéniablement humaine. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, there are signs of human activity. The planet is inhabited — large concentrations of people detected. Human-made structures too, albeit crude ones."

traits.locale_text: « J'enregistre des signes d'activité humaine, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. » Cette planète est habitée, je détecte à sa surface une forte concentration d'individus ainsi que des infrastructures rudimentaires, certes, mais de facture indéniablement humaine. »

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, hay indicios de actividad humana. El planeta está habitado; detecto grandes concentraciones de personas. También estructuras humanas, aunque rudimentarias».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, there are signs of human activity. The planet is inhabited — large concentrations of people detected. Human-made structures too, albeit crude ones."

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán, hay indicios de actividad humana. El planeta está habitado; detecto grandes concentraciones de personas. También estructuras humanas, aunque rudimentarias».
